title: Schema Registry
subtitle: Browse subjects and schema versions from Confluent/Apicurio-compatible registries.

empty.title: No schemas registered
empty.description: Register a schema to enable serialization checks.

selectPrompt: Select a subject to view its schema versions.

delete.title: Soft-delete subject "{{name}}"?
delete.description: All versions of this subject will be soft-deleted in the Schema Registry. This can be restored administratively.
delete.label: Soft-delete
